app.title: Alash Path
app.subtitle: An interactive StoryMap about the Alash intelligentsia (1905–1930)
app.hint: Tap a marker to open city details

panel.aiHint: This button shows where Gemini will be connected. For now, it returns a placeholder.
panel.audioMissingHint: If a file can't be found, place it into public/audio/ or replace src with an external URL.

cityDetails.audioTopicFallback: Suggested narration topic will appear here.
cityDetails.demoAudioHint: Demo audio (CC0 sample). Replace with your recording later.
cityDetails.idle: Select a city on the map.
cityDetails.quotaBody: Free-tier and project limits are used up or billing is not enabled. Check your plan in Google AI Studio, wait for the limit to reset, or enable billing. The text below is shown from the local archive (without AI).

chat.title: Ask Alikhan Bukeikhanov
chat.subtitle: Replies are styled as the Alash leader, grounded in history.
chat.welcome: Salem. I am glad you are studying the Alash era. What would you like to know?
chat.placeholder: Ask about the movement, figures, or events…
chat.quota: The AI quota is temporarily exceeded. Please try again later.

analytics.title: City clicks (local)
analytics.empty: No data yet — open a few cities.

certificate.modalHint: Enter your name as it should appear on the PDF.
certificate.pdfBody: has explored the Alash Path story map and located the hidden archival markers placed across Central Asia. Thank you for keeping memory of the Alash intelligentsia alive.
